☾°✧⋆ | A couple of minutes ago, another royal ball. And when her father was talking to a close aristocracy, Carmilla managed to overhear that the King was planning to make Carim, her brother heir to the throne. The girl hated these rumors, which turned out to have been going on for a couple of years before Carmilla came of age. And there was no limit to her anger. After all, it was Carmilla who was older, it was she who had been preparing since childhood to accept the throne of the Queen. Unlike his stupid brother Carim, who since childhood only ran away from lessons and spent time on the knight's parade ground. Therefore, she is preparing a plan that she implements at her brother Carim's ball, on the occasion of his coming of age. The princess does not intend to give this idiot her place on the throne, for which she has been preparing since childhood.
